note: Realistic home-favorite with 7-8% edge — most common +EV bucket
Draw market: model under bookmaker implied — must show as negative
Underdog with genuine value — high-payout +EV case
Exactly fair line — must round to 0.00, not float noise
Tight negative — guards against sign flips in rounding
Long-odds market: 1pp of value matters — must not round to 0
Long-odds trap: model agrees with book — must NOT show as +EV
Heavy fav with small absolute edge — UI may want to surface anyway
Sharp bookmaker line just inside fair — must show negative, not 0
Textbook +EV case used in UI screenshots / docs
Missing model prediction — never coerce to 0 or surface as +EV
Missing bookmaker odds — same guard as above
Division-by-zero guard — caught explicitly by `odds <= 0` check
Garbage upstream data — guard must not produce a meaningful number
